https://github.com/ethereum/EIPs/pull/11891/changes

Please take a look, clarify a few things

author: garyrong
content:
As <@830368514225340436> pointed out in my EIP-PR, `TX_VALUE_COST = 4,244 < ACCOUNT_WRITE = 8,000.`

Maybe it worths a discussion here. In https://eips.ethereum.org/EIPS/eip-2780, it says 

`TX_VALUE_COST    4,244    Recipient balance write performed by a value transfer`

I will interpret the balance write as a account-write, so `TX_VALUE_COST`  should implicitly cover the account write.

My hunch is 4244 is derived with formula: 21,000 - TX_BASE_COST - TRANSFER_LOG_COST - COLD_ACCOUNT_ACCESS for backward compatibility. I will interpret it as a technical debt. Maybe <@968526635735326741> has some insights?

https://hackmd.io/@bFEBbZiVSAO0IURh9qzEFg/By_QgEoXMe

Also I have this writeup for myself, but maybe worth to share here, some quirks around AccountWrite charging can be interesting
